title: February 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 20''' is the 51st day of the year. There are 314 days remaining (315 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 23|''Star Wars'' (1977) 23]] published.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 104|''Star Wars Weekly'' 104]] published.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode VI Revenge of the Jedi]]'' first draft is completed.
*[[1983]] – [[Bronson Webb]] is born.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 39|''Star Wars'' (1998) 39]] published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 1]]'' published.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 8|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 8]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Heir to the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Heir to the Empire'' abridged audiobook]] published on digital platform.
*[[2008]] – [[Dark Times 9|''Dark Times'' 9]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation 5|''Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation'' 5]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 18|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 18]] published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Jedi: Survivor]]'' published.
*2024 – [[Thrawn (novel)|''Thrawn'']] reprinted in paperback.
*2024 – ''[[Thrawn: Alliances]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2024 – ''[[Thrawn: Treason]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Collection]]'' published.
